_comment_header: REPLAY FIXTURE for Veyra tests. NOT an export from a real Supabase project. Shape mimics Supabase MCP list_storage_buckets + get_storage_config; the supabase-rls agent (step 09) consumes this when --supabase-mcp is configured. Without MCP, cc-11-12 must be reported as coverage_gap, not silent absence.
